title: The Important Events Occurring in This Year
description: 'Abd al-Malik b. Marwin dismissed Umayyah b. 'Abdallih from the governorship of Khurisin and included Khurisin and Sijistin under the jurisdiction of al-Hajjaj b. Yusuf. When they were included in his jurisdiction, al-Hajjaj dispersed his officials throughout them. The Officials Whom al- Hajjaj Appointed in Khurusan and Sijistun, and Why He Appointed

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
